mnemonics: Cisco Presses IoT: Connect, Process, Secure (CPS)
keyPoints: Cisco Press is a leading publisher of technical books on networking, including IoT.
Their IoT materials cover architecture, security, and practical implementation guides.
The content is authoritative and often used for professional certification preparation.
commonMistakes: Confusing Cisco Press (the publisher) with Cisco Systems (the company that owns it).
Assuming all IoT standards and practices are vendor-neutral; Cisco Press content is often geared towards Cisco technologies and solutions.
Overlooking the practical labs and configuration examples provided, which are a key part of the learning material.
